description_long: This is a life-sized adult figure dressed in full military-style attire, including a helmet with attached ear protection, a fitted tactical vest, and long-sleeved uniform with matching pants. The uniform features a digital camouflage pattern, and the figure is equipped with sturdy combat boots and black gloves. The face is partially visible beneath the helmet, and the figure's arms are extended horizontally in a T-pose. The overall build is robust, with protective gear adding bulk to the torso and limbs. The figure appears ready for urban operations, with all clothing and accessories designed for utility and protection in demanding environments.
description: A robust adult in full military-style uniform with helmet, tactical vest, gloves, and boots, posed with arms extended. The attire is designed for protection and utility in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the helmet, facial features, tactical vest, gloves, and boots, with arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the helmet, the thickness of the vest, and the side contour of the boots and gloves.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the helmet, vest, and uniform, with the arms and legs fully visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the helmet, vest, gloves, and boots from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: military uniform with tactical vest, helmet, and gloves
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
